stemHtml: Which of the following is correct with regards to the seasonal weather conditions in Hong Kong?

options.a: Moist with SW winds in summer and dry with NE winds in winter.
options.b: Mild and dry with SW winds in summer and moist with NE winds in winter.
options.c: Moist with NE winds in summer and dry and mild with SW winds in winter.
options.d: Dry and mild with NE winds in summer and moist with SW winds in winter.
